LESSON.CAMERA_AUTH_ERROR: Hand landmarker failed while detecting landmarks
LESSON.CAMERA_CAPTION: Live learner camera for comparing your hand sign
LESSON.CAMERA_DENIED: Could not open the camera. Please allow camera access in your browser.
LESSON.CAMERA_UNAVAILABLE: Camera is not available on this device.
LESSON.CORRECTION_ALMOST: Almost there. Adjust your hand angle and keep the palm closer to the sample.
LESSON.CORRECTION_PASSED: Correct. Your thumb placement is strong. Raise the index finger slightly for a cleaner shape.
LESSON.DEFAULT_PRACTICE_TIP: Use your right hand for better accuracy. Match your hand shape to the sample, keep fingers visible, and compare it with the camera preview.
LESSON.LOCKED_MESSAGE: This lesson is locked. Complete previous lessons to unlock it.
LESSON.NO_HAND_DETECTED: No hand detected in the camera. Keep your hand clearly visible.
LESSON.PROGRESS_SYNC_FAILED: Could not save lesson progress. Please try again.
LESSON.SAMPLE_CAPTION: Sample image for the hand sign
LESSON.STABILITY_TIMEOUT: Please hold your hand steady again
